title: desmidorchis dalzellii
intro: Desmidorchis dalzellii, also known as the Dalzell's orchid or Kasthuri manjal, is a flowering plant species found in the tropical forests of southern India. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The rhizome of Desmidorchis dalzellii has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain and improving overall health. It is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as oil and powder, to treat conditions like rheumatism and skin diseases.
